content: Hello! I've been working with @Miguel Ojeda to provide Linus with what he wants for the v6.1-rc1 pull request of Rust, which seems to be having a maintainer he's known for a while do the PR. I assume that so when he sees something he doesn't like he can come burn down my house. Anyway, I want to do the PR from the perspective of what's in MAINTAINERS and what's been in linux-next, so I've just created a signed tag that I'll send Linus's way this weekend or Monday. Are there any other folks I should mention here? I went through all the patch tags to generate the list: https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/releases/tag/rust-v6.1-rc1
If those are all the names in the co-authored/signed-off/commits then there's probably a 95% chance its complete.

Yeah, that's everyone who had a tag on the commits, ordered by # of signed-off-bys, then by # of all other tags.
And you're welcome! I'm happy to play the "get flamed by Linus for violating secret PR rules" role. ;)

Are there any other folks I should mention here?

Since you mention giving credit to others outside the kernel tree side, if you want to be even more thorough, you could pick extra names from the "Acknowledgements" section from each cover letter.

Doing so would make names like Philip & Arthur (Rust GCC), Antoni (rustc_codegen_gcc), Emilio (bindgen), Arnaldo (pahole), Lina (Asahi), Yujie & Philip (0 Day), Mark & Philipp (Rust side), Mats & Marc, (Compiler Explorer) etc. appear.

Updated list:

Thanks a lot for updating it! :)

A few changes, if you may:

  • I made a typo once with Philip (sorry...), so he appears twice in your list: Philip Herron & Philip Herrons. It is Philip Herron (without s). Please keep the one nearby Arthur.

  • There were some people that came to Kangrejos which would be nice to credit too:

    • David Faust (he should probably go after Arthur, since he works on Rust GCC).
    • Elena Zannoni
    • Jose E. Marchesi
    • Julia Lawall
    • Kent Overstreet
    • y86-dev

  • @y86 Do you want to appear? I don't see you there, and you definitely contributed! (and came to Kangrejos :) With your real name or nick?
Would love to be on that list! You can use my real name.
I will send your name privately to Kees.
Another one: @Gary Guo may or may not want to appear as "Xuan Guo (Gary)"

/me dons his asbestos suit
PR sent: https://lore.kernel.org/lkml/202210010816.1317F2C@keescook/
